ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only insert the first suggested link for each target note in a note.
ast.target: 在一条笔记中，仅为每个目标笔记插入第一个建议的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap for applied suggestions in a single note.
ast.target: 单条笔记中应用建议的硬性上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which match types can create review suggestions.
ast.target: 选择哪些匹配类型可以创建审阅建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow frontmatter aliases to participate in exact phrase matching.
ast.target: 允许前置元数据别名参与精确短语匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not suggest links inside Markdown headings.
ast.target: 不要在 Markdown 标题内建议链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma or newline separated paths to skip during indexing and analysis.
ast.target: 索引和分析期间要跳过的逗号或换行符分隔的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma or newline separated file paths to skip.
ast.target: 要跳过的逗号或换行符分隔的文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: File paths that stay in the vault but are never suggested as link targets. You can also add these from review rows.
ast.target: 保留在保险库中但永远不会被建议为链接目标的文件路径。您也可以从审阅行中添加这些路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add title/path wildcard patterns that are never suggested as link targets, such as *_index_*.
ast.target: 添加永远不会被建议为链接目标的标题/路径通配符模式，例如 *_index_*。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Avoid suggesting navigation, template, dated log, and placeholder notes as link targets. Explicit aliases still opt a note back into matching.
ast.target: 避免将导航、模板、日期日志和占位符笔记建议为链接目标。显式别名仍可使笔记重新参与匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Words or phrases in note text that should never be turned into auto-links.
ast.target: 笔记文本中不应被转换为自动链接的单词或短语。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One-word note titles that should not become broad auto-link targets unless an explicit alias or local context supports them.
ast.target: 除非有显式别名或本地上下文支持，否则不应成为广泛自动链接目标的单词笔记标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma or newline separated title/path patterns skipped as auto-link targets. Use wildcard patterns.
ast.target: 作为自动链接目标跳过的逗号或换行符分隔的标题/路径模式。使用通配符模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading text used when accepted suggestions are inserted into the footer.
ast.target: 将接受的建议插入页脚时使用的标题文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum accepted suggestions to include when using footer insertion.
ast.target: 使用页脚插入时包含的最大已接受建议数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Build the semantic index for AI suggestions and explorer views. The default local model downloads automatically and runs on this device.
ast.target: 为 AI 建议和资源管理器视图构建语义索引。默认的本地模型会自动下载并在此设备上运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embedding backend used for the semantic note index. Local model is the zero-setup default; external local servers are optional.
ast.target: 用于语义笔记索引的嵌入后端。本地模型是零设置的默认选项；外部本地服务器是可选的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Transformers.js model downloaded automatically on first build and cached locally by Obsidian/Electron.
ast.target: Transformers.js 模型在首次构建时自动下载，并由 Obsidian/Electron 本地缓存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto tries graphics acceleration when Obsidian exposes it, then falls back to the processor.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 暴露图形加速时，自动尝试使用图形加速，然后回退到处理器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Planned number of semantic candidates to retrieve per query span.
ast.target: 计划为每个查询跨度检索的语义候选数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Refresh and pick from embedding models currently available for the selected semantic provider.
ast.target: 刷新并从当前选定语义提供程序可用的嵌入模型中选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this local server for semantic embeddings.
ast.target: 使用此本地服务器进行语义嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manual model override used for embedding requests. Pick from the live list above or enter a custom model name.
ast.target: 用于嵌入请求的手动模型覆盖。从上方的实时列表中选择或输入自定义模型名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum summary length per note used for semantic indexing.
ast.target: 用于语义索引的每条笔记的最大摘要长度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Distance basis used for semantic projection views. Cosine normalizes vectors before projection.
ast.target: 用于语义投影视图的距离基础。余弦在投影前对向量进行归一化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show persistent embedding-explorer labels only when the camera is this close or closer.
ast.target: 仅当摄像机距离此值或更近时，才显示持久性嵌入资源管理器标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum confidence needed to show a semantic suggestion in review.
ast.target: 在审阅中显示语义建议所需的最低置信度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default confidence threshold used for pre-accepting semantic suggestions.
ast.target: 用于预先接受语义建议的默认置信度阈值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Periodically rebuild note metadata and semantic embeddings when the vault has changed.
ast.target: 当保险库发生更改时，定期重建笔记元数据和语义嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often the plugin checks for changed notes and rebuilds indexes.
ast.target: 插件检查已更改笔记并重建索引的频率。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cosine normalizes vectors first. Euclidean keeps the raw vector scale.
ast.target: 余弦首先对向量进行归一化。欧几里得保持原始向量比例。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Nearest labels within this distance stay visible; farther labels fade out.
ast.target: 在此距离内的最近标签保持可见；更远的标签会淡出。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每条笔记的最大链接数

ast.name: warn

ast.target: THREE.WebGLTextures: sRGB 编码的纹理必须使用 RGBAFormat 和 UnsignedByteType。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebXRManager: Cannot change framebuffer scale while presenting.
ast.target: THREE.WebXRManager: 在呈现期间无法更改帧缓冲区缩放比例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebXRManager: Cannot change reference space type while presenting.
ast.target: THREE.WebXRManager: 在呈现期间无法更改参考空间类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Texture samplers can not be part of an uniforms group.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 纹理采样器不能是 uniforms 组的一部分。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 不支持的 uniform 值类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Can't change size while VR device is presenting.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: VR 设备正在呈现时无法更改尺寸。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: SkinnedMesh can only be used with WebGL 2. With WebGL 1 OES_texture_float and vertex textures support is required.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: SkinnedMesh 仅可用于 WebGL 2。对于 WebGL 1，需要 OES_texture_float 和顶点纹理支持。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Uniform Buffer Objects can only be used with WebGL 2.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Uniform Buffer Objects 仅可用于 WebGL 2。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Render-to-texture extension was disabled because an external texture was provided
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 渲染到纹理扩展已被禁用，因为提供了外部纹理。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: can only be used with WebGL2.

ast.name: warn
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: 仅支持 THREE.DataTexture3D 和 THREE.DataTexture2DArray。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: 对压缩 srcTexture 的支持未经测试。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: the property .physicallyCorrectLights has been removed. Set renderer.useLegacyLights instead.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 属性 .physicallyCorrectLights 已被移除。请改为设置 renderer.useLegacyLights。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.Line.computeLineDistances(): Computation only possible with non-indexed BufferGeometry.
ast.target: THREE.Line.computeLineDistances(): 仅当使用非索引 BufferGeometry 时才能计算。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: Multiple instances of Three.js being imported.
ast.target: 警告：检测到多个 Three.js 实例被导入。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
ngraph.graph: Starting from version 0.14 `uniqueLinkId` is deprecated.
Use `multigraph` option instead
ast.target: ngraph.graph: 从版本 0.14 起，`uniqueLinkId` 已弃用。\n请改用 `multigraph` 选项。\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Note: there is also change in default behavior: From now on each graph
is considered to be not a multigraph by default (each edge is unique).
ast.target: 注意：默认行为也发生了变化：从现在起，每个图默认不被视为多重图（每条边都是唯一的）。

ast.name: warn

ast.target: THREE.TrackballControls: 不支持的相机类型。

ast.target: 警告：OrbitControls.js 遇到未知的相机类型 - 已禁用推拉/缩放功能。
